positive: A stylized minimalist portrait of a stylized mythical griffin perched atop a crystalline celestial sphere. The griffin has highly detailed, sweeping feathers in tones of deep sapphire blue and electric gold. Its posture is regal and vigilant. The background features abstract, swirling nebulae in deep indigo and amethyst, providing high contrast against the brightly illuminated subject. Style is neo-art nouveau, combining clean graphic lines with cosmic bioluminescence. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, ideal for apparel printing. Use flat, solid blocks of color (color blocking) accented by glowing gradients. Highly visible print lines, vector art quality, studio lighting, octane render, 4k resolution.
